**lebop v0.0.1** ŌĆö initial public release.

lebop is an agentic Linear CLI and MCP server. It treats Linear issues
as markdown files you can edit, diff, and apply ŌĆö the same workflow you
already use for code.

## Two shapes

- **Ad-hoc ops** ŌĆö `list`, `show`, `set`, `comment`, `new`, `archive`,
  `pull` / `edit` / `push`, `diff`, plus `raw` as a GraphQL escape hatch.
- **Declarative planning** ŌĆö author a project + its issues + their
  relationships as a directory of markdown files, then `lebop plan apply`
  realizes the whole graph in Linear in one idempotent pass.

## Surface

- **CLI**: ~40 commands covering issues, projects, initiatives, cycles,
  milestones, labels, documents, agent-sessions, team members, comments,
  relations, attachments, and a GraphQL escape hatch.
- **MCP server** (`lebop mcp`): 63 stdio tools ŌĆö every CLI feature is
  reachable over MCP except the 3 that are CLI-only by nature
  (interactive auth, shell completions, the MCP server itself).
- **Markdown linter**: 6 rules that catch Linear's renderer quirks
  (table-cell `1.` breaking rows, `text\n---` silently becoming a setext
  H2, etc.) plus repo-scoped rules (bracket issue refs, path rewrites,
  custom regex formats).
- **Multi-workspace** support with per-call `--workspace` overrides;
  auth at `~/.lebop/auth.json` (mode 0600).
- **Stale-guarded pushes** ŌĆö `updatedAt` check; `--force` to bypass.

## Install

```sh
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/N0xMare/lebop/main/scripts/install.sh | bash
```

macOS / Linux, x64 / arm64. Verifies SHA256 against the `SHA256SUMS`
attached to this release. Drops a single self-contained binary (no Bun
runtime needed at install time) at `~/.local/bin/lebop`. See the
[README](https://github.com/N0xMare/lebop#readme) for source-install
and `LEBOP_INSTALL_DIR` / `LEBOP_VERSION` overrides.

## Authenticate and try it

```sh
lebop auth login                                  # Linear PAK (Settings ŌåÆ API)
lebop teams
lebop list --assignee me --state-type started
```

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/N0xMare/lebop#readme) ŌĆö quick start,
  configuration, Claude Code / agent integration.
- [`docs/spec.md`](https://github.com/N0xMare/lebop/blob/main/docs/spec.md)
  ŌĆö full architecture, command reference, plan workflow, lint rule
  catalog, Linear API facts and discovered quirks.

## Known constraints in this release

- `push_changes` over MCP currently handles `title` + `description`
  field updates; state/priority/labels/assignee/parent route through
  `update_issue` with explicit `team` arg. The CLI `lebop push` handles
  every field type.
- `status` does not yet show "stale (remote newer)" ŌĆö staleness is
  currently discovered at push time.
- No retry / rate-limit backoff at the SDK boundary yet.
